<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-56"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-56" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.56</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">December 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added setting to enable/disable terminal progress bar (OSC 9;4)</li>
<li>VSCode Extension: Added support for VS Code’s secondary sidebar (VS Code 1.97+), allowing Claude Code to be displayed in the right sidebar while keeping the file explorer on the left. Requires setting sidebar as Preferred Location in the config.</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-55"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-55" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.55</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 26, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed proxy DNS resolution being forced on by default. Now opt-in via <code>CLAUDE_CODE_PROXY_RESOLVES_HOSTS=true</code> environment variable</li>
<li>Fixed keyboard navigation becoming unresponsive when holding down arrow keys in memory location selector</li>
<li>Improved AskUserQuestion tool to auto-submit single-select questions on the last question, eliminating the extra review screen for simple question flows</li>
<li>Improved fuzzy matching for <code>@</code> file suggestions with faster, more accurate results</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-54"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-54" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.54</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 26, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Hooks: Enable PermissionRequest hooks to process ‘always allow’ suggestions and apply permission updates</li>
<li>Fix issue with excessive iTerm notifications</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-52"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-52" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.52</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 24, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed duplicate message display when starting Claude with a command line argument</li>
<li>Fixed <code>/usage</code> command progress bars to fill up as usage increases (instead of showing remaining percentage)</li>
<li>Fixed image pasting not working on Linux systems running Wayland (now falls back to wl-paste when xclip is unavailable)</li>
<li>Permit some uses of <code>$!</code> in bash commands</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-51"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-51" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.51</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 24, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added Opus 4.5! <a href="https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-5" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-5</a></li>
<li>Introducing Claude Code for Desktop: <a href="https://claude.com/download" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">https://claude.com/download</a></li>
<li>To give you room to try out our new model, we’ve updated usage limits for Claude Code users. See the Claude Opus 4.5 blog for full details</li>
<li>Pro users can now purchase extra usage for access to Opus 4.5 in Claude Code</li>
<li>Plan Mode now builds more precise plans and executes more thoroughly</li>
<li>Usage limit notifications now easier to understand</li>
<li>Switched <code>/usage</code> back to ”% used”</li>
<li>Fixed handling of thinking errors</li>
<li>Fixed performance regression</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-50"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-50" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.50</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 21, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed bug preventing calling MCP tools that have nested references in their input schemas</li>
<li>Silenced a noisy but harmless error during upgrades</li>
<li>Improved ultrathink text display</li>
<li>Improved clarity of 5-hour session limit warning message</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-49"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-49" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.49</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 21, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added readline-style ctrl-y for pasting deleted text</li>
<li>Improved clarity of usage limit warning message</li>
<li>Fixed handling of subagent permissions</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-47"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-47" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.47</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 19, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Improved error messages and validation for <code>claude --teleport</code></li>
<li>Improved error handling in <code>/usage</code></li>
<li>Fixed race condition with history entry not getting logged at exit</li>
<li>Fixed Vertex AI configuration not being applied from <code>settings.json</code></li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-46"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-46" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.46</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 19, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed image files being reported with incorrect media type when format cannot be detected from metadata</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-45"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-45" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.45</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 18, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added support for Microsoft Foundry! See <a href="https://code.claude.com/docs/en/azure-ai-foundry" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">https://code.claude.com/docs/en/azure-ai-foundry</a></li>
<li>Added <code>PermissionRequest</code> hook to automatically approve or deny tool permission requests with custom logic</li>
<li>Send background tasks to Claude Code on the web by starting a message with <code>&amp;</code></li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-43"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-43" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.43</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 18, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added <code>permissionMode</code> field for custom agents</li>
<li>Added <code>tool_use_id</code> field to <code>PreToolUseHookInput</code> and <code>PostToolUseHookInput</code> types</li>
<li>Added skills frontmatter field to declare skills to auto-load for subagents</li>
<li>Added the <code>SubagentStart</code> hook event</li>
<li>Fixed nested <code>CLAUDE.md</code> files not loading when @-mentioning files</li>
<li>Fixed duplicate rendering of some messages in the UI</li>
<li>Fixed some visual flickers</li>
<li>Fixed NotebookEdit tool inserting cells at incorrect positions when cell IDs matched the pattern <code>cell-N</code></li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-42"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-42" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.42</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 15, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added <code>agent_id</code> and <code>agent_transcript_path</code> fields to <code>SubagentStop</code> hooks.</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-41"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-41" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.41</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 14, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added <code>model</code> parameter to prompt-based stop hooks, allowing users to specify a custom model for hook evaluation</li>
<li>Fixed slash commands from user settings being loaded twice, which could cause rendering issues</li>
<li>Fixed incorrect labeling of user settings vs project settings in command descriptions</li>
<li>Fixed crash when plugin command hooks timeout during execution</li>
<li>Fixed: Bedrock users no longer see duplicate Opus entries in the /model picker when using <code>--model haiku</code></li>
<li>Fixed broken security documentation links in trust dialogs and onboarding</li>
<li>Fixed issue where pressing ESC to close the diff modal would also interrupt the model</li>
<li>ctrl-r history search landing on a slash command no longer cancels the search</li>
<li>SDK: Support custom timeouts for hooks</li>
<li>Allow more safe git commands to run without approval</li>
<li>Plugins: Added support for sharing and installing output styles</li>
<li>Teleporting a session from web will automatically set the upstream branch</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-37"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-37" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.37</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 11, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed how idleness is computed for notifications</li>
<li>Hooks: Added matcher values for Notification hook events</li>
<li>Output Styles: Added <code>keep-coding-instructions</code> option to frontmatter</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-36"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-36" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.36</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 7, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed: DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER environment variable now properly disables package manager update notifications</li>
<li>Fixed queued messages being incorrectly executed as bash commands</li>
<li>Fixed input being lost when typing while a queued message is processed</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-35"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-35" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.35</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 6, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Improve fuzzy search results when searching commands</li>
<li>Improved VS Code extension to respect <code>chat.fontSize</code> and <code>chat.fontFamily</code> settings throughout the entire UI, and apply font changes immediately without requiring reload</li>
<li>Added <code>CLAUDE_CODE_EXIT_AFTER_STOP_DELAY</code> environment variable to automatically exit SDK mode after a specified idle duration, useful for automated workflows and scripts</li>
<li>Migrated <code>ignorePatterns</code> from project config to deny permissions in the localSettings.</li>
<li>Fixed menu navigation getting stuck on items with empty string or other falsy values (e.g., in the <code>/hooks</code> menu)</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-34"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-34" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.34</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 5, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>VSCode Extension: Added setting to configure the initial permission mode for new conversations</li>
<li>Improved file path suggestion performance with native Rust-based fuzzy finder</li>
<li>Fixed infinite token refresh loop that caused MCP servers with OAuth (e.g., Slack) to hang during connection</li>
<li>Fixed memory crash when reading or writing large files (especially base64-encoded images)</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-33"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-33" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.33</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 4, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Native binary installs now launch quicker.</li>
<li>Fixed <code>claude doctor</code> incorrectly detecting Homebrew vs npm-global installations by properly resolving symlinks</li>
<li>Fixed <code>claude mcp serve</code> exposing tools with incompatible outputSchemas</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-32"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-32" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.32</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">November 4, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Un-deprecate output styles based on community feedback</li>
<li>Added <code>companyAnnouncements</code> setting for displaying announcements on startup</li>
<li>Fixed hook progress messages not updating correctly during PostToolUse hook execution</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-31"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-31" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.31</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 31, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Windows: native installation uses shift+tab as shortcut for mode switching, instead of alt+m</li>
<li>Vertex: add support for Web Search on supported models</li>
<li>VSCode: Adding the respectGitIgnore configuration to include .gitignored files in file searches (defaults to true)</li>
<li>Fixed a bug with subagents and MCP servers related to “Tool names must be unique” error</li>
<li>Fixed issue causing <code>/compact</code> to fail with <code>prompt_too_long</code> by making it respect existing compact boundaries</li>
<li>Fixed plugin uninstall not removing plugins</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-30"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-30" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.30</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 30, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added helpful hint to run <code>security unlock-keychain</code> when encountering API key errors on macOS with locked keychain</li>
<li>Added <code>allowUnsandboxedCommands</code> sandbox setting to disable the dangerouslyDisableSandbox escape hatch at policy level</li>
<li>Added <code>disallowedTools</code> field to custom agent definitions for explicit tool blocking</li>
<li>Added prompt-based stop hooks</li>
<li>VSCode: Added respectGitIgnore configuration to include .gitignored files in file searches (defaults to true)</li>
<li>Enabled SSE MCP servers on native build</li>
<li>Deprecated output styles. Review options in <code>/output-style</code> and use —system-prompt-file, —system-prompt, —append-system-prompt, CLAUDE.md, or plugins instead</li>
<li>Removed support for custom ripgrep configuration, resolving an issue where Search returns no results and config discovery fails</li>
<li>Fixed Explore agent creating unwanted .md investigation files during codebase exploration</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where <code>/context</code> would sometimes fail with “max_tokens must be greater than thinking.budget_tokens” error message</li>
<li>Fixed <code>--mcp-config</code> flag to correctly override file-based MCP configurations</li>
<li>Fixed bug that saved session permissions to local settings</li>
<li>Fixed MCP tools not being available to sub-agents</li>
<li>Fixed hooks and plugins not executing when using —dangerously-skip-permissions flag</li>
<li>Fixed delay when navigating through typeahead suggestions with arrow keys</li>
<li>VSCode: Restored selection indicator in input footer showing current file or code selection status</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-28"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-28" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.28</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 27, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Plan mode: introduced new Plan subagent</li>
<li>Subagents: claude can now choose to resume subagents</li>
<li>Subagents: claude can dynamically choose the model used by its subagents</li>
<li>SDK: added —max-budget-usd flag</li>
<li>Discovery of custom slash commands, subagents, and output styles no longer respects .gitignore</li>
<li>Stop <code>/terminal-setup</code> from adding backslash to <code>Shift + Enter</code> in VS Code</li>
<li>Add branch and tag support for git-based plugins and marketplaces using fragment syntax (e.g., <code>owner/repo#branch</code>)</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where macOS permission prompts would show up upon initial launch when launching from home directory</li>
<li>Various other bug fixes</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-27"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-27" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.27</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 24, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>New UI for permission prompts</li>
<li>Added current branch filtering and search to session resume screen for easier navigation</li>
<li>Fixed directory @-mention causing “No assistant message found” error</li>
<li>VSCode Extension: Add config setting to include .gitignored files in file searches</li>
<li>VSCode Extension: Bug fixes for unrelated ‘Warmup’ conversations, and configuration/settings occasionally being reset to defaults</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-25"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-25" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.25</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 21, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Removed legacy SDK entrypoint. Please migrate to @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk for future SDK updates: <a href="https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/migration-guide" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/migration-guide</a></li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-24"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-24" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.24</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 20, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed a bug where project-level skills were not loading when —setting-sources ‘project’ was specified</li>
<li>Claude Code Web: Support for Web -&gt; CLI teleport</li>
<li>Sandbox: Releasing a sandbox mode for the BashTool on Linux &amp; Mac</li>
<li>Bedrock: Display awsAuthRefresh output when auth is required</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-22"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-22" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.22</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 17, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed content layout shift when scrolling through slash commands</li>
<li>IDE: Add toggle to enable/disable thinking.</li>
<li>Fix bug causing duplicate permission prompts with parallel tool calls</li>
<li>Add support for enterprise managed MCP allowlist and denylist</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-21"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-21" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.21</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 18, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Support MCP <code>structuredContent</code> field in tool responses</li>
<li>Added an interactive question tool</li>
<li>Claude will now ask you questions more often in plan mode</li>
<li>Added Haiku 4.5 as a model option for Pro users</li>
<li>Fixed an issue where queued commands don’t have access to previous messages’ output</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-20"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-20" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.20</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 16, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added support for Claude Skills</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-19"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-19" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.19</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 15, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Auto-background long-running bash commands instead of killing them. Customize with BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where Haiku was unnecessarily called in print mode</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-17"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-17" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.17</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 15, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added Haiku 4.5 to model selector!</li>
<li>Haiku 4.5 automatically uses Sonnet in plan mode, and Haiku for execution (i.e. SonnetPlan by default)</li>
<li>3P (Bedrock and Vertex) are not automatically upgraded yet. Manual upgrading can be done through setting <code>ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL</code></li>
<li>Introducing the Explore subagent. Powered by Haiku it’ll search through your codebase efficiently to save context!</li>
<li>OTEL: support HTTP_PROXY and HTTPS_PROXY</li>
<li><code>CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC</code> now disables release notes fetching</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-15"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-15" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.15</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 14, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed bug with resuming where previously created files needed to be read again before writing</li>
<li>Fixed bug with <code>-p</code> mode where @-mentioned files needed to be read again before writing</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-14"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-14" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.14</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 10, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fix @-mentioning MCP servers to toggle them on/off</li>
<li>Improve permission checks for bash with inline env vars</li>
<li>Fix ultrathink + thinking toggle</li>
<li>Reduce unnecessary logins</li>
<li>Document —system-prompt</li>
<li>Several improvements to rendering</li>
<li>Plugins UI polish</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="2-0-13"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#2-0-13" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">2.0.13</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">October 9, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed <code>/plugin</code> not working on native build</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
