<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-71"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-71" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.71</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">August 7, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Background commands: (Ctrl-b) to run any Bash command in the background so Claude can keep working (great for dev servers, tailing logs, etc.)</li>
<li>Customizable status line: add your terminal prompt to Claude Code with /statusline</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-70"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-70" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.70</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">August 7, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Performance: Optimized message rendering for better performance with large contexts</li>
<li>Windows: Fixed native file search, ripgrep, and subagent functionality</li>
<li>Added support for @-mentions in slash command arguments</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-69"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-69" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.69</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">August 5, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Upgraded Opus to version 4.1</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-68"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-68" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.68</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">August 4, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fix incorrect model names being used for certain commands like <code>/pr-comments</code></li>
<li>Windows: improve permissions checks for allow / deny tools and project trust. This may create a new project entry in <code>.claude.json</code> - manually merge the history field if desired.</li>
<li>Windows: improve sub-process spawning to eliminate “No such file or directory” when running commands like pnpm</li>
<li>Enhanced /doctor command with CLAUDE.md and MCP tool context for self-serve debugging</li>
<li>SDK: Added canUseTool callback support for tool confirmation</li>
<li>Added <code>disableAllHooks</code> setting</li>
<li>Improved file suggestions performance in large repos</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-65"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-65" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.65</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 31, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>IDE: Fixed connection stability issues and error handling for diagnostics</li>
<li>Windows: Fixed shell environment setup for users without .bashrc files</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-64"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-64" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.64</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 30, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Agents: Added model customization support - you can now specify which model an agent should use</li>
<li>Agents: Fixed unintended access to the recursive agent tool</li>
<li>Hooks: Added systemMessage field to hook JSON output for displaying warnings and context</li>
<li>SDK: Fixed user input tracking across multi-turn conversations</li>
<li>Added hidden files to file search and @-mention suggestions</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-63"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-63" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.63</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 29, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Windows: Fixed file search, @agent mentions, and custom slash commands functionality</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-62"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-62" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.62</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 28, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added @-mention support with typeahead for custom agents. @<code>&lt;your-custom-agent&gt;</code> to invoke it</li>
<li>Hooks: Added SessionStart hook for new session initialization</li>
<li>/add-dir command now supports typeahead for directory paths</li>
<li>Improved network connectivity check reliability</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-61"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-61" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.61</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 25, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Transcript mode (Ctrl+R): Changed Esc to exit transcript mode rather than interrupt</li>
<li>Settings: Added <code>--settings</code> flag to load settings from a JSON file</li>
<li>Settings: Fixed resolution of settings files paths that are symlinks</li>
<li>OTEL: Fixed reporting of wrong organization after authentication changes</li>
<li>Slash commands: Fixed permissions checking for allowed-tools with Bash</li>
<li>IDE: Added support for pasting images in VSCode MacOS using ⌘+V</li>
<li>IDE: Added <code>CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_CONNECT_IDE=false</code> for disabling IDE auto-connection</li>
<li>Added <code>CLAUDE_CODE_SHELL_PREFIX</code> for wrapping Claude and user-provided shell commands run by Claude Code</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-60"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-60" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.60</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 24, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>You can now create custom subagents for specialized tasks! Run /agents to get started</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-59"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-59" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.59</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 23, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>SDK: Added tool confirmation support with canUseTool callback</li>
<li>SDK: Allow specifying env for spawned process</li>
<li>Hooks: Exposed PermissionDecision to hooks (including “ask”)</li>
<li>Hooks: UserPromptSubmit now supports additionalContext in advanced JSON output</li>
<li>Fixed issue where some Max users that specified Opus would still see fallback to Sonnet</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-58"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-58" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.58</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 23, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added support for reading PDFs</li>
<li>MCP: Improved server health status display in ‘claude mcp list’</li>
<li>Hooks: Added CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR env var for hook commands</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-57"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-57" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.57</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 23, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added support for specifying a model in slash commands</li>
<li>Improved permission messages to help Claude understand allowed tools</li>
<li>Fix: Remove trailing newlines from bash output in terminal wrapping</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-56"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-56" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.56</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 23, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Windows: Enabled shift+tab for mode switching on versions of Node.js that support terminal VT mode</li>
<li>Fixes for WSL IDE detection</li>
<li>Fix an issue causing awsRefreshHelper changes to .aws directory not to be picked up</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-55"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-55" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.55</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 23, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Clarified knowledge cutoff for Opus 4 and Sonnet 4 models</li>
<li>Windows: fixed Ctrl+Z crash</li>
<li>SDK: Added ability to capture error logging</li>
<li>Add —system-prompt-file option to override system prompt in print mode</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-54"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-54" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.54</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 19, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Hooks: Added UserPromptSubmit hook and the current working directory to hook inputs</li>
<li>Custom slash commands: Added argument-hint to frontmatter</li>
<li>Windows: OAuth uses port 45454 and properly constructs browser URL</li>
<li>Windows: mode switching now uses alt + m, and plan mode renders properly</li>
<li>Shell: Switch to in-memory shell snapshot to fix file-related errors</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-53"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-53" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.53</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 18, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Updated @-mention file truncation from 100 lines to 2000 lines</li>
<li>Add helper script settings for AWS token refresh: awsAuthRefresh (for foreground operations like aws sso login) and awsCredentialExport (for background operation with STS-like response).</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-52"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-52" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.52</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 18, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added support for MCP server instructions</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-51"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-51" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.51</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 11, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added support for native Windows (requires Git for Windows)</li>
<li>Added support for Bedrock API keys through environment variable AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK</li>
<li>Settings: /doctor can now help you identify and fix invalid setting files</li>
<li><code>--append-system-prompt</code> can now be used in interactive mode, not just —print/-p.</li>
<li>Increased auto-compact warning threshold from 60% to 80%</li>
<li>Fixed an issue with handling user directories with spaces for shell snapshots</li>
<li>OTEL resource now includes os.type, os.version, host.arch, and wsl.version (if running on Windows Subsystem for Linux)</li>
<li>Custom slash commands: Fixed user-level commands in subdirectories</li>
<li>Plan mode: Fixed issue where rejected plan from sub-task would get discarded</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-48"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-48" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.48</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 10, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed a bug in v1.0.45 where the app would sometimes freeze on launch</li>
<li>Added progress messages to Bash tool based on the last 5 lines of command output</li>
<li>Added expanding variables support for MCP server configuration</li>
<li>Moved shell snapshots from /tmp to ~/.claude for more reliable Bash tool calls</li>
<li>Improved IDE extension path handling when Claude Code runs in WSL</li>
<li>Hooks: Added a PreCompact hook</li>
<li>Vim mode: Added c, f/F, t/T</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-45"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-45" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.45</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 10, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Redesigned Search (Grep) tool with new tool input parameters and features</li>
<li>Disabled IDE diffs for notebook files, fixing “Timeout waiting after 1000ms” error</li>
<li>Fixed config file corruption issue by enforcing atomic writes</li>
<li>Updated prompt input undo to Ctrl+_ to avoid breaking existing Ctrl+U behavior, matching zsh’s undo shortcut</li>
<li>Stop Hooks: Fixed transcript path after /clear and fixed triggering when loop ends with tool call</li>
<li>Custom slash commands: Restored namespacing in command names based on subdirectories. For example, .claude/commands/frontend/component.md is now /frontend:component, not /component.</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-44"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-44" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.44</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 7, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>New /export command lets you quickly export a conversation for sharing</li>
<li>MCP: resource_link tool results are now supported</li>
<li>MCP: tool annotations and tool titles now display in /mcp view</li>
<li>Changed Ctrl+Z to suspend Claude Code. Resume by running <code>fg</code>. Prompt input undo is now Ctrl+U.</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-43"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-43" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.43</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 3, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed a bug where the theme selector was saving excessively</li>
<li>Hooks: Added EPIPE system error handling</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-42"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-42" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.42</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 3, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added tilde (<code>~</code>) expansion support to <code>/add-dir</code> command</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-41"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-41" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.41</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 3, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Hooks: Split Stop hook triggering into Stop and SubagentStop</li>
<li>Hooks: Enabled optional timeout configuration for each command</li>
<li>Hooks: Added “hook_event_name” to hook input</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where MCP tools would display twice in tool list</li>
<li>New tool parameters JSON for Bash tool in <code>tool_decision</code> event</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-40"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-40" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.40</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">July 3, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed a bug causing API connection errors with UNABLE_TO_GET_ISSUER_CERT_LOCALLY if <code>NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS</code> was set</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Web search now takes today’s date into context</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where stdio MCP servers were not terminating properly on exit</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Improvements to plan mode</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-30"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-30" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.30</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 24, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Custom slash commands: Run bash output, @-mention files, enable thinking with thinking keywords</li>
<li>Improved file path autocomplete with filename matching</li>
<li>Added timestamps in Ctrl-r mode and fixed Ctrl-c handling</li>
<li>Enhanced jq regex support for complex filters with pipes and select</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Improved CJK character support in cursor navigation and rendering</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-28"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-28" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.28</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 24, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Slash commands: Fix selector display during history navigation</li>
<li>Resizes images before upload to prevent API size limit errors</li>
<li>Added XDG_CONFIG_HOME support to configuration directory</li>
<li>Performance optimizations for memory usage</li>
<li>New attributes (terminal.type, language) in OpenTelemetry logging</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-27"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-27" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.27</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 18, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Streamable HTTP MCP servers are now supported</li>
<li>Remote MCP servers (SSE and HTTP) now support OAuth</li>
<li>MCP resources can now be @-mentioned</li>
<li>/resume slash command to switch conversations within Claude Code</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Slash commands: moved “project” and “user” prefixes to descriptions</li>
<li>Slash commands: improved reliability for command discovery</li>
<li>Improved support for Ghostty</li>
<li>Improved web search reliability</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

</ul></div></div></div>
