<li>Released Python SDK: pip install claude-code-sdk to get started</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-22"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-22" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.22</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 12, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>SDK: Renamed <code>total_cost</code> to <code>total_cost_usd</code></li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-21"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-21" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.21</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 12, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Improved editing of files with tab-based indentation</li>
<li>Fix for tool_use without matching tool_result errors</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where stdio MCP server processes would linger after quitting Claude Code</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-18"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-18" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.18</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 9, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added —add-dir CLI argument for specifying additional working directories</li>
<li>Added streaming input support without require -p flag</li>
<li>Improved startup performance and session storage performance</li>
<li>Added CLAUDE_BASH_MAINTAIN_PROJECT_WORKING_DIR environment variable to freeze working directory for bash commands</li>
<li>Added detailed MCP server tools display (/mcp)</li>
<li>MCP authentication and permission improvements</li>
<li>Added auto-reconnection for MCP SSE connections on disconnect</li>
<li>Fixed issue where pasted content was lost when dialogs appeared</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-17"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-17" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.17</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 9, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>We now emit messages from sub-tasks in -p mode (look for the parent_tool_use_id property)</li>
<li>Fixed crashes when the VS Code diff tool is invoked multiple times quickly</li>
<li>MCP server list UI improvements</li>
<li>Update Claude Code process title to display “claude” instead of “node”</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-11"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-11" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.11</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 4, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Claude Code can now also be used with a Claude Pro subscription</li>
<li>Added /upgrade for smoother switching to Claude Max plans</li>
<li>Improved UI for authentication from API keys and Bedrock/Vertex/external auth tokens</li>
<li>Improved shell configuration error handling</li>
<li>Improved todo list handling during compaction</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-10"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-10" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.10</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 4, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added markdown table support</li>
<li>Improved streaming performance</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-8"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-8" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.8</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed Vertex AI region fallback when using CLOUD_ML_REGION</li>
<li>Increased default otel interval from 1s -&gt; 5s</li>
<li>Fixed edge cases where MCP_TIMEOUT and MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT weren’t being respected</li>
<li>Fixed a regression where search tools unnecessarily asked for permissions</li>
<li>Added support for triggering thinking non-English languages</li>
<li>Improved compacting UI</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-7"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-7" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.7</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Renamed /allowed-tools -&gt; /permissions</li>
<li>Migrated allowedTools and ignorePatterns from .claude.json -&gt; settings.json</li>
<li>Deprecated claude config commands in favor of editing settings.json</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where —dangerously-skip-permissions sometimes didn’t work in —print mode</li>
<li>Improved error handling for /install-github-app</li>
<li>Bugfixes, UI polish, and tool reliability improvements</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-6"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-6" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.6</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">June 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Improved edit reliability for tab-indented files</li>
<li>Respect CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR everywhere</li>
<li>Reduced unnecessary tool permission prompts</li>
<li>Added support for symlinks in @file typeahead</li>
<li>Bugfixes, UI polish, and tool reliability improvements</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-4"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-4" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.4</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 28, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Fixed a bug where MCP tool errors weren’t being parsed correctly</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-1"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-1" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.1</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 22, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added <code>DISABLE_INTERLEAVED_THINKING</code> to give users the option to opt out of interleaved thinking.</li>
<li>Improved model references to show provider-specific names (Sonnet 3.7 for Bedrock, Sonnet 4 for Console)</li>
<li>Updated documentation links and OAuth process descriptions</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="1-0-0"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#1-0-0" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">1.0.0</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 22, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Claude Code is now generally available</li>
<li>Introducing Sonnet 4 and Opus 4 models</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-125"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-125" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.125</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 21, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Breaking change: Bedrock ARN passed to <code>ANTHROPIC_MODEL</code> or <code>ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL</code> should no longer contain an escaped slash (specify <code>/</code> instead of <code>%2F</code>)</li>
<li>Removed <code>DEBUG=true</code> in favor of <code>ANTHROPIC_LOG=debug</code>, to log all requests</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-117"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-117" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.117</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 17, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Breaking change: —print JSON output now returns nested message objects, for forwards-compatibility as we introduce new metadata fields</li>
<li>Introduced settings.cleanupPeriodDays</li>
<li>Introduced CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY_HELPER_TTL_MS env var</li>
<li>Introduced —debug mode</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-108"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-108" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.108</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 13, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>You can now send messages to Claude while it works to steer Claude in real-time</li>
<li>Introduced BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS and BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS env vars</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where thinking was not working in -p mode</li>
<li>Fixed a regression in /cost reporting</li>
<li>Deprecated MCP wizard interface in favor of other MCP commands</li>
<li>Lots of other bugfixes and improvements</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-107"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-107" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.107</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 9, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>CLAUDE.md files can now import other files. Add @path/to/file.md to ./CLAUDE.md to load additional files on launch</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-106"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-106" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.106</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 9, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>MCP SSE server configs can now specify custom headers</li>
<li>Fixed a bug where MCP permission prompt didn’t always show correctly</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-105"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-105" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.105</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">May 8, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Claude can now search the web</li>
<li>Moved system &amp; account status to /status</li>
<li>Added word movement keybindings for Vim</li>
<li>Improved latency for startup, todo tool, and file edits</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Improved thinking triggering reliability</li>
<li>Improved @mention reliability for images and folders</li>
<li>You can now paste multiple large chunks into one prompt</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Fixed a crash caused by a stack overflow error</li>

</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Claude Code can now also be used with a Claude Max subscription (<a href="https://claude.ai/upgrade" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">https://claude.ai/upgrade</a>)</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-93"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-93" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.93</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 30, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Resume conversations from where you left off from with “claude —continue” and “claude —resume”</li>
<li>Claude now has access to a Todo list that helps it stay on track and be more organized</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-82"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-82" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.82</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 25, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added support for —disallowedTools</li>
<li>Renamed tools for consistency: LSTool -&gt; LS, View -&gt; Read, etc.</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-75"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-75" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.75</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 21, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Hit Enter to queue up additional messages while Claude is working</li>
<li>Drag in or copy/paste image files directly into the prompt</li>
<li>@-mention files to directly add them to context</li>
<li>Run one-off MCP servers with <code>claude --mcp-config &lt;path-to-file&gt;</code></li>
<li>Improved performance for filename auto-complete</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-74"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-74" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.74</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 18, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added support for refreshing dynamically generated API keys (via apiKeyHelper), with a 5 minute TTL</li>
<li>Task tool can now perform writes and run bash commands</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-72"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-72" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.72</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 18, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Updated spinner to indicate tokens loaded and tool usage</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Network commands like curl are now available for Claude to use</li>
<li>Claude can now run multiple web queries in parallel</li>
<li>Pressing ESC once immediately interrupts Claude in Auto-accept mode</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

</ul></div></div></div>

</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-61"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-61" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.61</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Navigate menus with vim-style keys (j/k) or bash/emacs shortcuts (Ctrl+n/p) for faster interaction</li>
<li>Enhanced image detection for more reliable clipboard paste functionality</li>
<li>Fixed an issue where ESC key could crash the conversation history selector</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Copy+paste images directly into your prompt</li>

<li>Bugfixes for non-interactive mode (-p)</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Fixed a bug with JPEG detection</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-50"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-50" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.50</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>New MCP “project” scope now allows you to add MCP servers to .mcp.json files and commit them to your repository</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-49"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-49" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.49</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Previous MCP server scopes have been renamed: previous “project” scope is now “local” and “global” scope is now “user”</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-47"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-47" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.47</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Press Tab to auto-complete file and folder names</li>
<li>Press Shift + Tab to toggle auto-accept for file edits</li>
<li>Automatic conversation compaction for infinite conversation length (toggle with /config)</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-44"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-44" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.44</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Ask Claude to make a plan with thinking mode: just say ‘think’ or ‘think harder’ or even ‘ultrathink’</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-41"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-41" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.41</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>MCP server startup timeout can now be configured via MCP_TIMEOUT environment variable</li>
<li>MCP server startup no longer blocks the app from starting up</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-37"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-37" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.37</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>New /release-notes command lets you view release notes at any time</li>
<li><code>claude config add/remove</code> commands now accept multiple values separated by commas or spaces</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-36"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-36" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.36</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Import MCP servers from Claude Desktop with <code>claude mcp add-from-claude-desktop</code></li>
<li>Add MCP servers as JSON strings with <code>claude mcp add-json &lt;n&gt; &lt;json&gt;</code></li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>Vim bindings for text input - enable with /vim or /config</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-32"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-32" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.32</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Interactive MCP setup wizard: Run “claude mcp add” to add MCP servers with a step-by-step interface</li>
<li>Fix for some PersistentShell issues</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-31"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-31" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.31</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Custom slash commands: Markdown files in .claude/commands/ directories now appear as custom slash commands to insert prompts into your conversation</li>
<li>MCP debug mode: Run with —mcp-debug flag to get more information about MCP server errors</li>
</ul></div></div></div>
<div class="update flex flex-col relative items-start w-full lg:flex-row gap-2 lg:gap-6 py-8 update-container" id="0-2-30"><div class="lg:sticky top-[var(--scroll-mt)] group flex flex-col w-full lg:w-[160px] items-start flex-shrink-0 justify-start"><div class="absolute"><a href="#0-2-30" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to changelog">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><div class="cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center flex-grow-0 justify-center font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-label">0.2.30</div><div class="px-1 text-secondary dark:text-secondary-light mt-3 text-sm max-w-[160px] break-words" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="update-description">April 2, 2025</div></div><div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden px-0.5 max-w-full"><div class="prose-sm" data-component-part="update-content"><ul>
<li>Added ANSI color theme for better terminal compatibility</li>
<li>Fixed issue where slash command arguments weren’t being sent properly</li>
<li>(Mac-only) API keys are now stored in macOS Keychain</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

<li>New /approved-tools command for managing tool permissions</li>
<li>Word-level diff display for improved code readability</li>
<li>Fuzzy matching for slash commands</li>
</ul></div></div></div>

gateway設定\",\"description\":\"Claude CodeをLLM Code開発コンテナについて学びます。\",\"href\":\"/ja/devcontainer\",\"hidden\":false}]}]},{\"tab\":\"管理\",\"groups\":[{\"group\":\"管理\",\"pages\":[{\"sidebarTitle\":\"高度なインストール\",\"title\":\"Claude Code
